category.scope_note: GaN fast charger and external power adapter comparison for consumer and commercial USB-C power-supply products.

title.en: China-to-EU GaN Fast Charger Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国氮化镓快充充电器进入欧盟：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國氮化鎵快充充電器進入歐盟：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China GaN fast charger documentation against EU CE, LVD, EMC, ecodesign, RoHS, and USB-C interoperability expectations.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国氮化镓快充充电器文件与欧盟 CE、LVD、EMC、生态设计、RoHS 和 USB-C 互操作要求差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國氮化鎵快充充電器文件與歐盟 CE、LVD、EMC、生態設計、RoHS 和 USB-C 互操作要求差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, energy-efficiency approval, or market-access approval. Exporters and importers should verify current EU product-safety, EMC, ecodesign, environmental, labelling, plug, USB-C, and destination-country requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or sale.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定、能效批准或市场准入批准。出口商和进口商在出货或销售前应与合格专业人士核验现行欧盟产品安全、EMC、生态设计、环保、标签、插头、USB-C 及目的国要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定、能效批准或市場准入批准。出口商和進口商在出貨或銷售前應與合格專業人士核驗現行歐盟產品安全、EMC、生態設計、環保、標籤、插頭、USB-C 及目的國要求。

answer_first.en: CE via LVD (EN IEC 62368-1) plus EMC, plus the Ecodesign external-power-supply efficiency (Code of Conduct / Reg 2019/1782) are the gaps; USB-PD interoperability is expected.
answer_first.zh: 主要差距是通过 LVD（EN IEC 62368-1）和 EMC 实现 CE，以及外部电源生态设计能效要求（行为准则 / Reg 2019/1782）；同时市场通常期望 USB-PD 互操作。
answer_first.zht: 主要差距是透過 LVD（EN IEC 62368-1）和 EMC 實現 CE，以及外部電源生態設計能效要求（行為準則 / Reg 2019/1782）；同時市場通常期望 USB-PD 互操作。

editorial_controls.source_policy: Official regulator, standards body, notified body, market-surveillance authority, customs, energy authority, or primary legal source preferred. Local PDFs are not accepted.
editorial_controls.change_control: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
